reviews.comment:
Muy buena y prolija .
Baños de 1ra.
El Sr. Que nos atendió  nos limpió  vidrios .parabrisas y espejos. Mientras se cargaba el combustible.
Impecable la cafetería. Linda la atención  de las señoras
Si había  un Sr. mayor que no dejaba que una caniche minitoy subiera a las veredas. Pe

(Translated by Google)
Very good and clean.
First-rate restrooms.
The gentleman who served us cleaned our windows, windshield, and mirrors while we were refueling.
The cafeteria was spotless. The ladies were very friendly.
There was an older gentleman who wouldn't let a miniature poodle onto the sidewalk.
